final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  ImageId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
Resources:
  KeyPair:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair
    Properties:
      KeyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyPair'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyPair'
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance with SSH access
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIpv6: ::/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SG'
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      InstanceType: m5d.large
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdb
          VirtualName: ephemeral0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance'
Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  PublicDnsName:
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline using Amazon Kinesis Data Stream and Kinesis Data Firehose, which delivers the data to an S3 bucket.'

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10

Resources:
  DataLakeBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-data-lake-bucket'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehosePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${DataLakeBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                Resource: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                Resource: '*'

  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-data-stream'
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis

  FirehoseStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose'
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt DataLakeBucket.Arn
        Prefix: 'year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/'
        ErrorOutputPrefix: 'errors/'
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: 1
          IntervalInSeconds: 60
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${AWS::StackName}-firehose'
          LogStreamName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose-stream'

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseStream.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 data lake bucket
    Value: !Ref DataLakeBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create AWS Macie session for automated sensitive data discovery and security monitoring.'

Resources:
  MacieServiceRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: MacieServicePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetBucketPolicy
                  - s3:GetBucketAcl
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:ListAllMyBuckets
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectTagging
                  - s3:GetBucketTagging
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MacieServiceRole'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  MacieJobRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: MacieJobPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                  - s3:GetObjectTagging
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MacieJobRole'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  MacieServiceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Macie Service Role
    Value: !GetAtt MacieServiceRole.Arn
  MacieSessionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Macie Session
    Value: !Sub 'aws macie2 create-session --name ${AWS::StackName}-MacieSession --finding-publisher-arn arn:${AWS::Partition}:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:event-bus/default --service-role ${MacieServiceRole.Arn} --status ENABLED --region ${AWS::Region}'
  MacieJobRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Macie Job Role
    Value: !GetAtt MacieJobRole.Arn
  MacieJobArn:
    Description: ARN of the Macie Automated Discovery Job
    Value: !Sub 'aws macie2 create-classification-job --job-type ONE_TIME --name ${AWS::StackName}-AutomatedDiscoveryJob --role-arn ${MacieJobRole.Arn} --s3-job-definition ''{"bucketDefinitions":[{"accountId":"${AWS::AccountId}","buckets":["*"]}] }'' --schedule-frequency ''{"daily":{}}'' --region ${AWS::Region}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Production-ready VPC infrastructure with one public subnet, two private subnets across AZs, NAT Gateway, security groups for ALB/app/DB, internal Application Load Balancer with listener, ECR repository, and SSM Parameters storing key resource IDs.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.3.0/24'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eip'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  PrivateNatRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-sg'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt ALBSecurityGroup.GroupId
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt ALBSecurityGroup.GroupId
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
        - IpProtocol: udp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt AppSecurityGroup.GroupId
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  ApplicationLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Type: application
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ApplicationLoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            StatusCode: '503'
            ContentType: 'text/plain'

  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-repo'
      ImageTagMutability: MUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-repo'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: production
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  VpcIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/vpc/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  PublicSubnetIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/public-subnet/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  PrivateSubnet1IdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/private-subnet-1/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  PrivateSubnet2IdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/private-subnet-2/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  ALBSGIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/alb-sg/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  AppSGIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/app-sg/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-sg-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  DBSGIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/db-sg/id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg-id-ssm'
        Environment: production

  ALBListenerArnParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/alb-listener/arn'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBListener
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-listener-arn-ssm'
        Environment: production

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EventBridge Pipes workflow to enrich SQS messages with external API data and log results.

Resources:
  EnrichmentQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EnrichmentQueue"

  EnrichedLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/pipes/${AWS::StackName}-EnrichedEvents"
      RetentionInDays: 30

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  EnrichmentLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EnrichmentLambda"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.enrich
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import datetime

          def enrich(event, context):
            try:
              zipcode = event['body']
              url = f"https://api.zippopotam.us/us/{zipcode}"
              with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as response:
                api_response = json.loads(response.read().decode())
              enriched_body = {
                "zipcode": zipcode,
                "location": api_response,
                "enrichedAt": datetime.datetime.now().isoformat()
              }
              event['body'] = json.dumps(enriched_body)
              return event
            except Exception as e:
              print(f"Enrichment failed: {str(e)}")
              return event

  PipesExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PipesExecutionRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SQSAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                  - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
                Resource: !GetAtt EnrichmentQueue.Arn
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt EnrichmentLambda.Arn
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "${EnrichedLogGroup.Arn}:*"

  EnrichmentPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EnrichmentPipe"
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesExecutionRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt EnrichmentQueue.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        SqsQueueParameters:
          BatchSize: 1
          MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 1
      Enrichment: !GetAtt EnrichmentLambda.Arn
      Target: !GetAtt EnrichedLogGroup.Arn

Outputs:
  EnrichmentQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue for sending messages to enrich
    Value: !Ref EnrichmentQueue
  EnrichmentPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Pipe for enrichment workflow
    Value: !Ref EnrichmentPipe
  EnrichmentLambdaArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function for message enrichment
    Value: !GetAtt EnrichmentLambda.Arn
  EnrichedLogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group for enriched events
    Value: !Ref EnrichedLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Custom Resource for Math Operations with Failure Simulation

Parameters:
  FirstNumber:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 0
  SecondNumber:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
    MinValue: 0
  Operator:
    Type: String
    Default: 'add'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'add'
      - 'subtract'
      - 'multiply'
      - 'divide'
  SimulateFailure:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  MathHelperLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request

          def handler(event, context):
              def send_response(event, context, status, data=None, reason=None, physical_resource_id=None):
                  response_data = {
                      "Status": status,
                      "Reason": reason or f"See the details in CloudWatch Log Group: {context.log_group_name} Log Stream: {context.log_stream_name}",
                      "PhysicalResourceId": physical_resource_id or event.get("PhysicalResourceId", "default"),
                      "StackId": event["StackId"],
                      "RequestId": event["RequestId"],
                      "LogicalResourceId": event["LogicalResourceId"]
                  }
                  if data is not None:
                      response_data["Data"] = data
                  json_to_send = json.dumps(response_data).encode("utf-8")
                  headers = {
                      "content-type": "",
                      "content-length": str(len(json_to_send))
                  }
                  req = urllib.request.Request(event["ResponseURL"], data=json_to_send, headers=headers, method="PUT")
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                      print(str(response.read()))

              try:
                  resource_properties = event["ResourceProperties"]
                  first_number = float(resource_properties["FirstNumber"])
                  second_number = float(resource_properties["SecondNumber"])
                  operator = resource_properties["Operator"]
                  simulate_failure = resource_properties["SimulateFailure"]

                  if simulate_failure == "true":
                      send_response(event, context, "FAILED", data={"Error": "Simulated failure"})
                      return

                  request_type = event["RequestType"]

                  if request_type == "Delete":
                      physical_resource_id = event["PhysicalResourceId"]
                      send_response(event, context, "SUCCESS", physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)
                      return

                  stack_name = event["StackId"].split("/")[1]
                  physical_resource_id = event.get("PhysicalResourceId", f"{stack_name}-helper")

                  if operator == "add":
                      result = first_number + second_number
                  elif operator == "subtract":
                      result = first_number - second_number
                  elif operator == "multiply":
                      result = first_number * second_number
                  elif operator == "divide":
                      if second_number == 0:
                          send_response(event, context, "FAILED", data={"Error": "Division by zero"}, physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)
                          return
                      result = first_number / second_number
                  else:
                      send_response(event, context, "FAILED", data={"Error": f"Invalid operator: {operator}"}, physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)
                      return

                  send_response(event, context, "SUCCESS", data={"Result": str(result)}, physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)

              except Exception as e:
                  send_response(event, context, "FAILED", reason=str(e))

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref MathHelperLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      SourceArn: !Sub arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*

  MathHelper:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt MathHelperLambda.Arn
      FirstNumber: !Ref FirstNumber
      SecondNumber: !Ref SecondNumber
      Operator: !Ref Operator
      SimulateFailure: !Ref SimulateFailure

Outputs:
  CalculationResult:
    Value: !GetAtt MathHelper.Result
  PhysicalResourceId:
    Value: !GetAtt MathHelper.PhysicalResourceId
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Value: !Ref MathHelperLambda
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-5158769e' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-5158769e: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'MathHelperLambda: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MathHelperLambda: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'MathHelper: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MathHelper: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-5158769e: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless calculator workflow using AWS Step Functions and Lambda for arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide).

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'

  CalculatorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/${Calculator}'
      RetentionInDays: 3
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  Calculator:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              operator = event.get('operator')
              operands = event.get('operands', [])
              if not operator or len(operands) != 2:
                  raise ValueError('Invalid input: operator and two operands required')
              try:
                  a = float(operands[0])
                  b = float(operands[1])
              except (ValueError, IndexError):
                  raise ValueError('Operands must be a list of two numbers')
              if operator == 'add':
                  result = a + b
              elif operator == 'subtract':
                  result = a - b
              elif operator == 'multiply':
                  result = a * b
              elif operator == 'divide':
                  if b == 0:
                      raise ValueError('Division by zero')
                  result = a / b
              else:
                  raise ValueError(f'Unsupported operator: {operator}')
              return {'result': result}
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  StepFunctionsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsLambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !Sub '${Calculator.Arn}'

  CalculatorStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: Calculator-StateMachine
      StateMachineType: EXPRESS
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StepFunctionsExecutionRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: !Sub |
        {
          "Comment": "A calculator workflow that routes to arithmetic operations",
          "StartAt": "Router",
          "States": {
            "Router": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "add",
                  "Next": "Add"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "subtract",
                  "Next": "Subtract"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "multiply",
                  "Next": "Multiply"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "divide",
                  "Next": "Divide"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "FailState"
            },
            "Add": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "Subtract": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "Multiply": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "Divide": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "operator.$": "$.operator",
                "operands.$": "$.operands"
              },
              "Next": "Success"
            },
            "Success": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            },
            "FailState": {
              "Type": "Fail",
              "Cause": "Unsupported operator"
            }
          }
        }
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

Outputs:
  CalculatorStateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator State Machine
    Value: !Ref CalculatorStateMachine
  CalculatorLambdaArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator Lambda Function
    Value: !GetAtt Calculator.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-c684656e' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-c684656e: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Calculator: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'Calculator: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CalculatorLogGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CalculatorLogGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'StepFunctionsExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'StepFunctionsExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CalculatorStateMachine: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CalculatorStateMachine: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-c684656e: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']
deploy_completed_resources: LambdaExecutionRole | Calculator | CalculatorLogGroup | StepFunctionsExecutionRole | CalculatorStateMachine | iac-god-eval-c684656e

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for Auto Scaling Groups of Linux and Windows EC2 instances managed by AWS Systems Manager (SSM) in public subnets of a VPC.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SSM managed instances allowing HTTP, SSH inbound and all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG'

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2RoleforSSM

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2-ami-kernel-5.10-hvm-2.0-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true

  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateName: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: '$Latest'
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-linux-asg'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateName: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: '$Latest'
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-windows-asg'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  LinuxAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the Linux Auto Scaling Group. Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for secure access and management.'
    Value: !Ref LinuxAutoScalingGroup
  WindowsAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the Windows Auto Scaling Group. Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for secure access and management.'
    Value: !Ref WindowsAutoScalingGroup
  InstanceSecurityGroupId:
    Description: 'Security Group ID for instances in the ASGs, configured for SSM operations and HTTP/SSH access.'
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  VPCId:
    Description: 'VPC ID hosting the public subnets with SSM-managed EC2 Auto Scaling Groups accessible via Session Manager.'
    Value: !Ref VPC

    us-east-2:

    us-west-2:

    Properties:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated image analysis pipeline using S3, Lambda, Step Functions, Rekognition, and SNS for human face detection with conditional SMS alerts.'

Parameters:
  PhoneNumber:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^\\+?[1-9]\\d{1,14}$'
    Description: 'E.164 formatted phone number for SMS alerts (leave empty to skip subscription).'

Conditions:
  CreateSubscription: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PhoneNumber, '']]

Resources:
  ImagesBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-images-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: 's3:ObjectCreated:*'
            Function: !GetAtt StarterLambda.Arn
            Filter:
              S3Key:
                Rules:
                  - Name: prefix
                    Value: 'images/'

  StarterLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StartStepFunctions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: states:StartExecution
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:${AWS::StackName}-ImageAnalysisStateMachine'

  StarterLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3

          def handler(event, context):
              record = event['Records'][0]['s3']
              bucket = record['bucket']['name']
              key = record['object']['key']
              sts = boto3.client('sts')
              account = sts.get_caller_identity()['Account']
              region = os.environ['AWS_REGION']
              state_machine_name = os.environ['STATE_MACHINE_NAME']
              state_machine_arn = f"arn:aws:states:{region}:{account}:stateMachine:{state_machine_name}"
              sfn = boto3.client('stepfunctions')
              sfn.start_execution(
                  stateMachineArn=state_machine_arn,
                  input=json.dumps({'bucket': bucket, 'key': key})
              )
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Timeout: 30
      Role: !GetAtt StarterLambdaRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          STATE_MACHINE_NAME: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageAnalysisStateMachine'

  StarterLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref StarterLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      SourceArn: !GetAtt ImagesBucket.Arn

  RekognitionLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RekognitionAndS3
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: rekognition:DetectLabels
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImagesBucket}/*'

  RekognitionLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3

          def handler(event, context):
              rekognition = boto3.client('rekognition')
              bucket = event['bucket']
              key = event['key']
              response = rekognition.detect_labels(
                  Image={'S3Object': {'Bucket': bucket, 'Name': key}},
                  MaxLabels=10,
                  MinConfidence=80,
                  Labels=['Person']
              )
              humanDetected = any(label['Name'] == 'Person' for label in response['Labels'])
              return {'humanDetected': humanDetected}
      Timeout: 60
      Role: !GetAtt RekognitionLambdaRole.Arn

  NotificationLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SNSPublish
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref AlertsTopic

  NotificationLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3

          def handler(event, context):
              sns = boto3.client('sns')
              message = f"Human face detected in s3://{event['bucket']}/{event['key']}"
              sns.publish(
                  TopicArn=event['topicArn'],
                  Message=message
              )
      Timeout: 30
      Role: !GetAtt NotificationLambdaRole.Arn

  ImageAnalysisStateMachineRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsExecution
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/states/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/states/*:*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt RekognitionLambda.Arn
                  - !GetAtt NotificationLambda.Arn

  ImageAnalysisStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageAnalysisStateMachine'
      RoleArn: !GetAtt ImageAnalysisStateMachineRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: !Sub |
        {
          "Comment": "Image analysis with Rekognition and conditional SNS alert",
          "StartAt": "AnalyzeImage",
          "States": {
            "AnalyzeImage": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${RekognitionLambda.Arn}",
              "InputPath": "$",
              "ResultPath": "$.analysis",
              "Next": "Choice"
            },
            "Choice": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.analysis.humanDetected",
                  "BooleanEquals": true,
                  "Next": "SendNotification"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "Success"
            },
            "SendNotification": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${NotificationLambda.Arn}",
              "Parameters": {
                "bucket.$": "$.bucket",
                "key.$": "$.key",
                "topicArn": "${AlertsTopic}"
              },
              "End": true
            },
            "Success": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            }
          }
        }

  AlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic

  SmsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: CreateSubscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sms
      Endpoint: !Ref PhoneNumber
      TopicArn: !Ref AlertsTopic

Outputs:
  ImagesBucketName:
    Description: 'S3 bucket for image uploads'
    Value: !Ref ImagesBucket
  ImageAnalysisStateMachineArn:
    Description: 'Step Functions state machine ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt ImageAnalysisStateMachine.Arn
  AlertsTopicName:
    Description: 'SNS topic for alerts'
    Value:
      Fn::GetAtt:
        - AlertsTopic
        - TopicName
  SmsSubscriptionEndpoint:
    Description: 'SMS phone number if created'
    Value:
      Fn::If:
        - CreateSubscription
        - !Ref PhoneNumber
        - 'No subscription created'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Serverless Slot Machine Web Application with S3 static hosting, Lambda for spins and deployment, Cognito Identity Pool for anonymous access.'

Parameters:
  SourceZipUri:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^s3://[^/]+/[^/]+\\.zip$'

Resources:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Deploys a highly available Jenkins server across multiple Availability Zones using an Auto Scaling Group in public subnets of a new VPC.
  Includes SSM integration for management without SSH keys, automated Jenkins installation, and secure networking with NACLs and Security Groups.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      SSMImageId: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64
    us-east-2:
      SSMImageId: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64
    us-west-2:
      SSMImageId: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64
    eu-west-1:
      SSMImageId: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64
    ap-southeast-1:
      SSMImageId: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicNACL'

  NACLInboundSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443
      Egress: false

  NACLInboundJenkins:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 8080
        To: 8080
      Egress: false

  NACLEphemeralOutboundTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  NACLEphemeralOutboundUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 210
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  NACLOutboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true

  PublicSubnet1NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  PublicSubnet2NACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  JenkinsSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins EC2 instances allowing SSH and Jenkins port
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSG'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId:
          Fn::Sub:
            - '{{resolve:ssm:${SSMParam}}}'
            - SSMParam: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', SSMImageId]
        InstanceType: t3.medium
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref JenkinsSG
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            dnf update -y
            dnf install -y java-17-amazon-corretto
            wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo \
              https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
            rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
            dnf install -y jenkins
            systemctl enable --now jenkins
            firewall-cmd --permanent --add-port=8080/tcp
            firewall-cmd --reload
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource JenkinsASG --region ${AWS::Region}

  JenkinsASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      DefaultInstanceWarmup: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  JenkinsASG:
    Description: ARN of the Jenkins Auto Scaling Group for management
    Value: !GetAtt JenkinsASG.AutoScalingGroupARN
  PublicSubnet1:
    Description: ID of Public Subnet 1
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2:
    Description: ID of Public Subnet 2
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Description: ID of the Jenkins Launch Template
    Value: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate

                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  StockPriceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-stock-price-lambda'
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              parameters = event.get('parameters', {})
              symbol = parameters.get('symbol', 'unknown')
              return {'stockPrice': 100}
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  BedrockAgentRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bedrock-agent-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bedrock-agent-policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-model/${FoundationModelId}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn

  BedrockInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref StockPriceLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: bedrock.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*'

  StockPriceAgent:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::Agent
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AgentName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-agent'
      AgentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt BedrockAgentRole.Arn
      FoundationModel: !Ref FoundationModelId
      Instruction: You are a helpful stock price assistant. For any stock-related query, invoke the getStockPrice action with the stock symbol extracted from the user query.
      ActionGroups:
        - ActionGroupName: StockActions
          ActionGroupExecutor:
            Lambda: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
          ApiSchema:
            Payload: |
              openapi: 3.0.0
              info:
                title: Stock Price API
                version: 1.0.0
              paths:
                /getStockPrice:
                  post:
                    requestBody:
                      required: true
                      content:
                        application/json:
                          schema:
                            type: object
                            required:
                              - symbol
                            properties:
                              symbol:
                                type: string
                    responses:
                      '200':
                        description: Successful response
                        content:
                          application/json:
                            schema:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                stockPrice:
                                  type: number

Outputs:
  AgentId:
    Description: ID of the Bedrock Agent
    Value: !Ref StockPriceAgent
  AgentArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent
    Value: !GetAtt StockPriceAgent.AgentArn
  LambdaArn:
    Description: ARN of the Stock Price Lambda Function
    Value: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
